subject: refactor(theme): migrate 9 simple components to Uniwind + DaisyUI tokens
body:
Convert ErrorState, PriceTrend, FuelTypeSelector, RadiusSelector,
MapErrorBoundary, StationMarker, CoordinatePicker, UpdatePrompt,
and DebugPill from StyleSheet.create() + useAppTheme to Uniwind
className with DaisyUI semantic classes (bg-base-100, text-primary,
border-base-300, etc.).

Components now use useTheme().colors for hex values needed by
FontAwesome icons, ActivityIndicator, and Mapbox marker styling.
StyleSheet retained only for platform-specific shadows, animations,
and hairline borders that can't be expressed in className.
